title: Harou's Netherite Shulkers
description: Prevent your Shulker Boxes from burning in lava or getting blown up.
body:
## Harou's Netherite Shulkers
![Example colored shulker boxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43eb5f6b5faaa006683000bdadd38f702f1b9833_0.webp)

### Description
This mod adds Netherite Shulker Boxes to the game, which are safe from lava and explosions.

### How to craft a Netherite Shulker Box
This is done in a Smithing table same as any other netherite tool, using Netherite Ingot, Netherite Upgrade and vanilla Shulker Box of any color.
![Smithing Table recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ded9dfb94fe799cd6054ff2bfa2e9eb7308d998_0.webp)

### Benefits
- Immunity to fire & lava
  - Saves your items when falling to lava
  - Use this to create lava streams to transfer items in your nether farms
- High explosion resistance
  - Survives both TNT & Creepers
- Custom icon/texture for all 16+1 colors.
  - Easily differentiate e.g. red shulker box for red building blocks and another one for redstone
  - Color can be changed using a dye in a crafting table
- Inventory size is the same as for normal shulker boxes
  - Both will have same output from comparators, making it easy to use them interchangably in redstone contraptions

### Compatibility
Shulker tooltip from Tweakaroo/MiniHUD should work out of the box

#### From version 1.0.1 these mods are compatible:
- [TakeItOut](https://modrinth.com/plugin/takeitout)
- [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

### More mods
Do you like this mod? Try some other mods I made, like:
- [Harou's Leashed Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/harous-leashed-fences)
- [Phantoms in the End](https://modrinth.com/mod/phantoms-in-the-end) 
- [Small Netherite Beacons](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-netherite-beacons)
